---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Darya Dimintiyanova | CEPSCI Inspector — Upstate SC"
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <span class="hero-eyebrow">CEPSCI-Certified · Upstate SC</span>
    <h1>Erosion &amp; Sediment Control Inspections, Done Right.</h1>
    <p class="lead">Reliable weekly SWPPP inspections that keep your construction site compliant with the NPDES Construction General Permit — and South Carolina's waterways clean.</p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="services.qmd" class="btn-hero">View Services →</a>
      <a href="contact.qmd" class="btn-hero-outline">Request a Quote</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

## What I Do {.section-title}

::: {.section-intro}
South Carolina's NPDES Construction General Permit requires active construction sites to conduct regular stormwater inspections by a **CEPSCI-certified inspector**. I'm Darya Dimintiyanova, a Clemson-trained CEPSCI inspector serving Anderson, Pickens, and the surrounding Upstate counties.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="feature-grid">
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">✓</div>
    <h3>Weekly SWPPP Inspections</h3>
    <p>Mandatory weekly site visits in accordance with the NPDES Construction General Permit, fully documented with written reports.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">📷</div>
    <h3>BMP Monitoring</h3>
    <p>Photo-documented inspection of Erosion Control Best Management Practices throughout the life of your project.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">📄</div>
    <h3>Compliance Reports</h3>
    <p>Professional reports delivered digitally to your project team and local municipal authorities — on time, every time.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">📍</div>
    <h3>Upstate SC Coverage</h3>
    <p>Primary service in Anderson and Pickens counties, with availability throughout the Upstate region.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="cta-strip">
  <h2>Ready to schedule an inspection?</h2>
  <p>Whether you're starting a new project or need to swap inspectors mid-build, I'd love to hear from you.</p>
  <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com" class="btn-cta">Email Darya →</a>
</section>
```
